reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención del personal.
Son muy atentos y siempre corrigen a los "más vivos" quienes obviamente no ven la fila y quieren pasar primeros.
Genios!

(Translated by Google)
The staff is very attentive.
They're very attentive and always correct the "smartest" people who obviously don't see the line and want to get in first.
Geniuses!
